title: Universal Water Bottle Holder With Blue Aluminum Carabiner Clip Attachment
description:
Now you can conveniently attach your water bottle to your bike, backpack or camping gear with the Water Bottle Holder With Blue Carabiner Clip! The water bottle holder is made out of durable plastic and can attach easily to most water bottles. This water bottle holder is attached to the aluminum carabiner by a durable nylon strap. The carabiner can be attached to any outdoor gear for easy convenience. It also can be used to carry a set of keys! Never worry about how to carry your water bottle wherever you go again with this Water Bottle Holder with Blue Carabiner Clip.
